coverLetter:
Subject: Application for Frontend Developer Intern - Siva Lavanya S

Dear Hiring Team at Zoyaraa,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Frontend Developer Intern position at Zoyaraa. As a 3rd-year Electronics and Communication Engineering student at Bannari Amman Institute of Technology, I have developed a passion for creating intuitive, user-friendly web interfaces that solve real-world problems.

Why I'm a great fit:

🎨 Frontend Skills

Proficient in React.js, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+)

Experience building responsive, mobile-first web applications

Familiar with modern CSS frameworks and styled-components

Understanding of REST API integration using Axios/Fetch

💡 What Excites Me About Zoyaraa

InternHub is exactly the kind of meaningful project I want to contribute to - a platform that streamlines internship management

The opportunity to work on real-world features like dashboards, application tracking, and certificate generation

Your focus on clean UI/UX that makes complex processes simple

🚀 What I Bring

Strong problem-solving mindset from my engineering background

Attention to detail in implementing designs pixel-perfectly

Eagerness to learn modern frontend best practices and tools

Collaborative spirit - I thrive in team environments

Technical Highlights:
✅ Built multiple React projects with responsive designs
✅ Experience with Git/GitHub for version control
✅ Understanding of component-based architecture
✅ Familiar with browser DevTools and debugging

I am excited about the possibility of contributing to Zoyaraa's mission while growing my skills as a frontend developer. I'm available to start immediately and commit fully to this internship.

Thank you for considering my application. I would love to discuss how I can add value to your frontend team.

Siva Lavanya S
Bannari Amman Institute of Technology
